holdings.infoBox: CLIX is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Long Online/Short Stores ETF (CLIX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ProShares Long Online/Short Stores index. The fund tracks a fixed-selection, tier-weighted index of both long and short positions in US-listed securities. CLIX was launched on Nov 14, 2017 and is issued by ProShares.
